During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], '''R2-B3''' was an [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] in [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo's]] [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] when she was in command of the [[Twin Suns Squadron]] on [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]], sometime after the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]]. The [[Droid/Legends|droid]] was nicknamed '''Cappie''' to honor deceased wingmate [[Anni Capstan]].

The droid was partnered with Jaina during the war from then on.

During the [[Defense of Mon Calamari (Yuuzhan Vong War)|battle at Mon Calamari]] near the end of the war, Cappie was badly damaged by vicious [[Yorik-et|coralskipper]] fire.

==Behind the scenes==
Cappie is assigned to Jaina in the novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines I: Rebel Dream]]'' by [[Aaron Allston]], where the droid makes its first appearance. The droid is reduced to molten scraps in ''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'', and is not mentioned beyond this point in time.

Cappie's [[Gender/Legends|gender-programming]] is also never discussed.
